assumptions: Budgetary pricing only: derived from one A3 floor-plan PDF with no structural, MEP, elevation, finish, soil, survey, or specification pack.
Pricing is in USD and assumes October to mid-March Zimbabwe rainy-season work, including productivity loss, protection, wet-weather access, stormwater diversion, and programme risk.
Measured allowance assumes approximately 316 m2 enclosed floor area and approximately 380 m2 roof/covered envelope, subject to CAD/BIM or IFC remeasurement.
Rates assume conventional masonry construction, reinforced concrete substructure and slab, standard lodge-grade finishes, and normal day-shift labour.
No client budget was provided; pricing is cost-plus with overhead, rainy-season contingency, provisional sums, and profit separated for audit.
Final tender must be revised after site visit, soil confirmation, finish schedule, door/window schedule, sanitary schedule, electrical layout, drainage design, and supplier quotations.
exclusions: Land, statutory approvals, professional fees, utility connection fees, permits, levies, and authority charges.
Abnormal ground, rock excavation, exceptional dewatering, contaminated material, retaining walls, major earthworks, and off-site roadworks.
Furniture, loose appliances, curtains, linen, signage, landscaping, borehole/water storage, solar/PV, generator, air-conditioning, CCTV, Wi-Fi, and specialist lodge equipment.
Price escalation, foreign-exchange movement, customs/duty shocks, and material price changes beyond quote validity.
Any scope not visible or inferable from the single floor-plan drawing.
